plugins.name: github-direnv
plugins.description: Folder-scoped GitHub authentication via direnv (auto-switch gh / git push by directory).

plugins.name: claude-session-to-md
plugins.description: Convert Claude Code session jsonl logs into per-session markdown files for archive/search.

plugins.name: blog-illustrate
plugins.description: Generate clean illustrations (terminal mockups, decision trees, comparison cards) for blog posts. HTML/CSS → Playwright PNG → blog MCP upload → body insertion.

plugins.name: ralph-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap a Ralph loop scaffold (specs/, TODO.md, PROMPT.md, decisions.md, progress.md) from a one-sentence goal — state files for running Claude in a fixed-prompt while-loop.

plugins.name: markdown-to-slides
plugins.description: Convert a markdown file into a 1920×1080 presentation HTML and per-slide Retina PNG images (3840×2160) via Playwright. Markdown in, slide deck out — no PowerPoint/Keynote.

plugins.name: assemble-team
plugins.description: 5-layer harness (Entry→Routing→Enrichment→Verification→Handoff) that converts a user plan into a safely spawned Claude Code agent team. Universal — works with any monorepo.

plugins.name: goalify
plugins.description: Convert any rough task prompt into a working /goal condition statement (measurable end state + real verification commands + anti-cheat constraints + turn bound) for Claude Code's run-until-done goal mode.

plugins.name: session-handover
plugins.description: Hand a long-running task to the next session without loss — a source-of-truth handover doc (work location, push state, remaining steps, live traps, creds-by-name) plus a paste-ready kickoff prompt that points at it.

plugins.name: finish-and-cleanup
plugins.description: Standardize the tail of a work session — PR merge → deploy watch → smoke check → worklog → worktree/branch/resource cleanup → main refresh — as a stepwise checklist. Repo-neutral via a fill-in per-project table.
